Author: Shifty Kiwi
Name: Autominion
Punchline: Dismisses on plot entry, summons on plot exit.
Description: Automatically dismisses a minion when entering a housing plot and summons one when leaving that plot. Main command: /autominion
Changelog: Fixes the owned-minion search UI so filtered results appear immediately, and sets the repo default branch to main so the GitHub page reflects current docs.
